amplifyuibuilder.form.fieldposition.CfnA: The `FieldPosition` property specifies the field position.

amplifyuibuilder.form.fieldposition.Belo.Description: The field position is below the field specified by the string.

amplifyuibuilder.form.fieldposition.Fixe.Description: The field position is fixed and doesn't change in relation to other fields.

amplifyuibuilder.form.fieldposition.Righ.Description: The field position is to the right of the field specified by the string.
